title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Novartis India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Novartis India
jsonLd.description:
Novartis India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Novartis India:
Novartis India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Novartis India!
